title: thymus zygis var. capitatus
intro: Thymus zygis var. capitatus, also known as Spanish thyme or Thyme of the mountains, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family and native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antifungal, and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, coughs, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thymus zygis var. capitatus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
